reviewMethod: Automated visual inspection of generated draft

checks.evidence: Single age-appropriate teen girl; styling avoids adult glamour.
One centered full-body character with refined collar detail and confident neutral stance.
Youth dance silhouette, practical shoes, movement-ready skirt and fitted top.
Clearly articulated layered cloud-shaped shoulder collar with traditional-inspired detailing.
Opaque primary fabric with controlled sheer sleeve accents and readable material hierarchy.
Disciplined navy-dominant palette with white secondary fields and restrained gold/blue trim.
Full figure and garment are coherent; no title, label, prompt residue, parameter note, watermark, logo, UI element, letter, or number is visible.

humanReviewReference: Gate-16 Human Sign-off — explicit StageOS project owner instruction
